$deviceId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['online','lastSeen','expiresAt','version','machine','os','gatewayOnline','gatewayUrl']) && newData.child('online').isBoolean() && newData.child('gatewayOnline').isBoolean() && newData.child('lastSeen').isNumber() && newData.child('expiresAt').isNumber() && newData.child('version').isString() && newData.child('version').val().length <= 40 && newData.child('machine').isString() && newData.child('machine').val().length <= 80 && newData.child('os').isString() && newData.child('os').val().length <= 40 && newData.child('gatewayUrl').isString() && ((newData.child('gatewayOnline').val() === false && newData.child('gatewayUrl').val() === '') || (newData.child('gatewayOnline').val() === true && newData.child('gatewayUrl').val().matches(/^https:\/\/[a-z0-9-]+\.trycloudflare\.com$/)))
